brand_dna.category: Melbourne-based mirrors, art prints and custom picture framing - a design-led home decor and wall art destination.
brand_dna.core_belief: Great walls are made, not bought - the right mirror, print or custom frame transforms a room, and quality decor should be accessible through smart pricing.
proof_points: Physical Melbourne store with published address and trading hours (03 9576 1566)
In-house custom picture framing, art restoration and conservation service
Limited edition prints from named Australian artists (John Olsen, Adam Cullen, Charles Blackman, David Bromley)
Made to Measure and Custom Made Mirrors, plus picture hanging and installation service
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, curated and design-forward on product, but value-driven and sale-heavy on price - gallery quality at bargain-friendly deals.

voice_pillars.name: Deal-Driven
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with sales, discounts and clearance urgency to make premium decor feel like a smart buy.
voice_pillars.quote: HOT WINTER SALE EOFY SALE - Site Wide Discounts - 30% Off Framing

voice_pillars.name: Gallery Curator
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks with the authority of an art gallery, naming artists, editions and originals.
voice_pillars.quote: Limited Edition Prints ... Original Artworks ... Gallery at Print Decor

voice_pillars.name: Helpful Guide
voice_pillars.desc: Writes to educate and reassure buyers through the decision, especially online shoppers.
voice_pillars.quote: How to Choose the Right Prints ... What You Should Know About Shopping for Prints Online

voice_pillars.name: Made-For-You
voice_pillars.desc: Emphasises bespoke, custom and made-to-size service over off-the-shelf product.
voice_pillars.quote: Made to Measure Mirrors ... Custom Made Mirrors ... Mirror Frames Made to Size

icp: Design-conscious Australian homeowners, renovators and interior designers who want statement mirrors, art and bespoke framing for their space, and love finding gallery-quality pieces at a genuine deal.

personas.name: The Renovator
personas.description: Mid-reno homeowner styling bathrooms and living spaces who is moved by made-to-measure and illuminated mirrors that fit exactly.

personas.name: The Art Collector
personas.description: Buyer chasing named Australian artists and limited editions who responds to originality, scarcity and gallery credibility.

personas.name: The Trade Pro
personas.description: Interior designer, architect or builder sourcing for fitouts who is moved by trade discounts, custom solutions and commercial framing.

offers: Site-wide EOFY sale with 30% off framing
Half Price and Clearance Stock (Overstocked and Underpriced)
Trade Discount for interior designers, architects, builders and commercial developers
Request a Quote and Request a Room Mock Up service
Picture Hanging and installation service in Melbourne

allowed.claim: Custom picture framing made to size in Melbourne
Made to Measure and Custom Made Mirrors
Limited edition prints from named Australian artists
Art restoration and conservation framing service
30% off framing during the EOFY sale
Picture hanging service available in Melbourne

banned.claim: 'Eco-friendly' or 'sustainable' frames or mirrors without specifics
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim needs verifiable backing
FTC Green Guides - carbon claims require specific, provable evidence

banned.claim: '100% recycled' or 'recycled timber' framing without proof
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - recycled-content claims must state a verified percentage

banned.claim: Illuminated mirrors 'relieve eye strain' or improve health
banned.why: Unsupported medical claim - no evidence provided on site
FTC Green Guides - vague environmental benefit claim is banned without qualification

banned.claim: Guaranteed investment value or appreciation of limited edition prints
banned.why: Unsubstantiated financial claim not supported by any site data
